verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I’m coming out of my shell, My vision's getting clearer I take a look outside this nest I see Him drawing nearer Your focus is only me, but I struggle to lift my hands You descend Your mighty wings, "Don’t you worry my child", You said Oh Lord…

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The more I know, The more I want to know Everything about You Jesus The more I see, The more I want to see You in my life The more I hear, The more I want to hear, The Words of Your promises of Love Words of Your love I want more of Your Holy Spirit I want more, more, more (of You)

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You nurtured me so precisely Never too much nor too little You know exactly what I need, You never give us More than we could handle I see You soar so far beyond the clouds Lord I want to do the same So I set my wings in Your promise Lord Making my victories in Your Name
